name: Hearty Beef Ragout
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Boneless beef chuck (cut into 1-inch pieces)
8 ounces Precooked sausage links (cut into 1-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe the beef clean.
2. Combine 1/3 cup flour with salt and pepper to coat the beef cubes evenly.
3. Place the coated beef in a crockpot.
4. Add remaining ingredients (except the last 2 tablespoons of flour and water) in order, stirring well after each addition.
5. Cover and cook on low setting for 7 to 12 hours.
6. One hour before serving, turn the crockpot to high heat.
7. Make a smooth paste from the last 2 tablespoons of flour and water.
8. Stir the paste into the crockpot, mixing well.
9. Cover and continue cooking until thickened.
